title: Define resume logic with semantic intent
summary: Specify deterministic resume logic that interprets semantic intent (e.g., "continue") using persisted semantic memory.
acceptance_criteria: Defines deterministic selection of latest non-terminal transaction.
Specifies next_action derivation using status, steps, file intents, verify/commit states, and semantic memory.
Defines how user intent (e.g., "continue") is interpreted from persisted semantic fields.
Includes precedence rules for materialized state vs event log rebuild.
Covers edge cases: no active transaction, corrupted tail events, integrity mismatch.

steps.description: Define transaction selection rules and tie-breakers for non-terminal transactions.
Specify next_action mapping using semantic_summary and user_intent.
Document rebuild triggers, truncation rules, and resume event emission.

notes: Align with semantic memory rationale in plan.md.
